visual_cues: 'Welcome to a simple and fast application' text
'Some of your records was deleted or moved' message

states.description: Dialog prompting for new name on save

visual_cues: recording entries with name, size, duration

transitions.postcondition: app launched first time or on splash

strategies.name: RECORD_AND_SAVE_DEFAULT_NAME
steps: wait a few seconds while recorder_recording
click stop button to enter recorder_paused or save_name_dialog
strategies.success_signal: recorder_idle shows latest record entry (e.g. Record-N with duration and size) and timer back to 00:00
strategies.fallback: If warning_dialog re-appears at any point, dismiss with 'Ok' then retry.

strategies.name: RECORD_WITH_CUSTOM_NAME_VIA_SAVE_DIALOG
strategies.preconditions: home_screen; app produces save_name_dialog after stop
steps: In save_name_dialog, clear default text in name field
input_text(desired filename without or with extension as required)
strategies.success_signal: records_list or recorder_idle shows entry with the chosen name
strategies.fallback: If save_name_dialog does not appear (stop leads directly to Paused), use Settings/Naming presets before recording instead

dead_ends.failed_action: click(index) targeting off-screen 'Apply' using invented index numbers
dead_ends.note: Agent repeatedly clicked non-existent indices (e.g. 34/35/37) believing Apply was visible. Apply is index 3 when visible; agent must use only indices present in the current UI list.

dead_ends.failed_action: input_text to set a free-form custom filename
dead_ends.note: Naming dialog only offers preset templates (Record-N, date formats, timestamp); it does NOT accept arbitrary custom names. Custom filenames must be entered in the post-recording save_name_dialog.

dead_ends.failed_action: click/long_press on a record entry to rename
dead_ends.note: No rename affordance from the list in this view; neither tap nor long-press opened a rename dialog.

dead_ends.failed_action: Attempting to type custom filename into Naming field
dead_ends.note: Field behaves as a selector, not an editable text box; typing has no effect on actual save name.

categories.name: CREATE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App launched and main create/compose surface reachable
abstract_steps: Navigate from launcher to the app's primary surface
Pass through onboarding/welcome if present
Confirm or accept default configuration if an initial configuration screen appears
Dismiss any transient informational dialogs
Trigger the primary create action (e.g. record/start)
Allow the creation process to run for the required duration
Trigger stop/finalize action
Confirm in any resulting finalize dialog
failure_modes: Clicking indices not present in the current UI listing
Mistaking a selector list for an editable text field
Ignoring or missing a blocking dialog
verification_checklist: A new entry with non-zero size/duration appears in the list or main view
No blocking dialog remains on screen

categories.name: CREATE_ENTRY_WITH_CUSTOM_NAME
categories.precondition: App provides a means to assign a custom label, either at finalization time or via pre-set options
abstract_steps: Perform CREATE_ENTRY up to the finalize step
When a finalize/name dialog appears, clear any pre-filled text
Type the desired custom name
Confirm finalization
failure_modes: Assuming a pre-creation name selector allows arbitrary text (it may only offer templates)
Trying to rename from a list view that lacks rename affordance
Getting stuck repeating the same invalid click instead of re-examining UI
Missing the finalize dialog because stop leads directly to an intermediate state
verification_checklist: Final entry appears with exactly the requested name
No duplicate entry with default name is left behind

categories.name: DISMISS_INTERRUPTION
categories.precondition: A modal dialog or notice is blocking interaction
abstract_steps: Identify the affirmative/dismiss button (e.g. confirm, close)
Click it
Re-evaluate resulting screen before next action
failure_modes: Ignoring the dialog and clicking through it
Clicking a secondary/expand button when dismissal is intended

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_APP
categories.precondition: Device on launcher or another app
abstract_steps: Launch the target app via any available mechanism (launcher icon, app list, or open-by-name)
Pass any first-run welcome screen
Arrive at the main functional surface
failure_modes: Stuck on onboarding if button not clicked
verification_checklist: App title in header matches expected

categories.name: RENAME_ENTRY
categories.precondition: An existing entry is present in a list
abstract_steps: Open the entry or its context menu (tap / long-press / overflow)
Locate a rename / edit-name option
Enter the desired label and confirm
failure_modes: App does not support relabeling from list view
Repeated taps produce no effect — agent must recognize and abandon
Confusing selection mode with edit mode
verification_checklist: Entry shows the updated label in list
